creator: nick@netability.ie
text:
the Evolution port downloads the .gz instead of the .bz2 evolution
	source image.  This is a bit of a waste of bandwidth, especially if
	you're on a low-bandwidth link.  It can be sped up by using bzip2
	instead of gzip.

Fix: 

add "USE_BZIP2=yes" to evolution port Makefile and MD5 sum to
	distinfo file.
